name: Chemistry Mashi
overview: Sucharita Lahiri, a middle-aged homemaker, becomes famous as Chemistry Mashi by imparting free chemistry lessons online. But when highly paid coaching institutes smell trouble, Sucharita must navigate politicised scandals and systemic corruption in the education sector to keep teaching those in need.

trailers.title: Official Trailer - Chemistry Mashi | Debasree Roy | Sourav Chakraborty | 14th February | hoichoi
